title: Japan records temperatures over 40°C for first time in Gifu and Aichi, declares 'extreme heat day'
summary: Several locations in central Japan exceed 40 degrees for the first time, with widespread heatstroke alerts.

title: Fair Trade Commission sanctions HOYA for violating subcontracting law by storing molds without cost
summary: This is the first time the law has been applied to a medical device manufacturer, ordering measures to prevent recurrence.

title: Average price of new apartments in Tokyo and three prefectures exceeds 100 million yen for first time
summary: In the first half of the year, the average value in the metropolitan area reaches a record, surpassing the '100 million yen' barrier.

title: Nikkei 225 rebounds with a rise of 2,091 points driven by semiconductors
summary: The Tokyo stock market recovers after three days of declines, with gains led by chip-related stocks.

title: US maintains attacks on Iran for tenth consecutive day, Trump warns of severe retaliation
summary: The US president promises that Iran will pay multiple times for each American soldier killed in the bombings.

title: Chinese and Russian warships conduct live-fire exercises within Japan's exclusive economic zone
summary: The Japanese Navy confirms that the ships fired machine guns near Okinotorishima Island, an unprecedented event.

title: Takashi government approves first 'Honebuto' economic policy framework with growth above 1%
summary: The basic policy document establishes active fiscal management and reforms to boost the economy.

title: Japanese government postpones mandatory My Number card requirement
summary: The possession rate exceeds 80 percent, but the government rules out making it mandatory for now, following the LDP's proposal.

title: Four people arrested for attempting to steal 190 million yen at Haneda Airport
summary: The suspects allegedly attacked cash couriers bound for Hong Kong with pepper spray.

title: New British Prime Minister Keir Barnum speaks with Trump and invites him to the G20 summit in Manchester
summary: Barnum, who was mayor of Manchester, becomes the fifth UK leader in four years.

title: Financial Agency and Tokyo Stock Exchange revise corporate governance code to boost investment
summary: The number of principles is reduced from 83 to 30, and an interpretation guide is introduced for greater flexibility.

title: Prince Akishino and Princess Kiko to visit Paraguay in August for 90th anniversary of Japanese immigration
summary: The official visit will take place from August 18 to 26 on the occasion of an invitation from the local Japanese community.

title: Spain regains top spot in FIFA rankings; Japan rises to 17th
summary: The Spanish football team ranks as the best in the world, while the Japanese team improves one position.

title: Spanish football team celebrates world title with massive parade in Madrid
summary: About two million people accompany the champions along the route, with performances and some crowds.

title: Nagoya court orders compensation to woman for being deceived about partner's marital status
summary: The man, who presented himself as single on an app, must pay 1.21 million yen in damages.

title: Anthropic pays 244 billion yen to settle lawsuit over use of pirated material in AI training
summary: The artificial intelligence company reached a settlement for using copyrighted content without permission.

title: Sapporo Nihon High School wins Hokkaido tournament and qualifies for summer Koshien
summary: Defeats Komadai Tomakomai 5-3 to return to the national high school baseball championship after a two-year absence.
